UserProgress.title: User Progress State
UserProgress.description: The unified state of the user including profile, workout logs, dietary meal records, and body measurements

profile.description: User profile with body stats, goals, and formulas

measurements.description: Weekly weight and biometric measurements history

dailyLogs.description: Daily food intake, meals, and adherence checklist logs

workouts.description: Workout sessions history, active calories, and strength notes

updatedAt.description: When this progress data was last synchronized with Firestore

/users/{userId}.description: Fully backed up user diet and workout state to allow cross-device sync
